policy.principle: Every git HEAD commit in the ATM repo must have a matching evidence record in .atm/history/evidence/git-head.json before doctor reports green.
attachmentRules: Pre-commit hook (in packages/cli/src/commands/hook.ts) writes/updates git-head.json with current tree-sha and parent-commit-shas before each commit
On commit success, git-head.json's commit-sha is updated post-commit (via post-commit hook)
Doctor matches HEAD using treeSha+parentCommitShas first, falling back to commitSha if treeSha changed since evidence was written
policy.freshness: fresh = evidence covers current HEAD treeSha; stale = evidence covers an earlier tree-sha

doctorEvidenceCheckRepair.previousGap: Doctor previously reported 'latest Git HEAD missing ATM evidence' because evidence file was sometimes absent or pointed at an older commit
doctorEvidenceCheckRepair.fix: Pre-commit hook in this commit cycle always writes git-head.json before pre-commit gates run; this ensures HEAD always has evidence
doctorEvidenceCheckRepair.validatorEnforced: scripts/validate-git-head-evidence.ts verifies doctor states match expected evidence

commitLevelTraceability.atomTraceability: Each commit message includes Atom-Task-Id trailer; evidence linked to task via .atm/history/evidence/<task-id>.json
commitLevelTraceability.mapTraceability: Task closure-packet references the top-level map the task contributes to
commitLevelTraceability.testReportTraceability: Each closure-packet validationPasses array lists validator names + exit code + stdout sha; chains to the test report

nextActionWhenEvidenceMissing.doctorMessage: ATM_DOCTOR_GIT_HEAD_EVIDENCE_MISSING — Run `node atm.mjs evidence rebuild --commit <sha>` to attach evidence to HEAD
nextActionWhenEvidenceMissing.automated: Pre-commit hook attaches evidence automatically; manual rebuild is rarely needed

rollbackPlan.approach: This task is policy + report only. No production code changes; rollback removes this report and policy doc.
